name: Grand Theft Auto: The Doomsday Heist (Feat. Diane Foxington)
description:
A reclusive billionaire technologist an idealistic intelligence operative a paranoid conspiracy theorist and a volatile supercomputer are forced into a fragile alliance to prevent the total annihilation of San Andreas as apocalyptic threats rise from the shadows you and your criminal crew are drawn into a maze of covert operations and buried secrets chasing dangers that span from the crowded streets of downtown Los Santos to the ocean floor and deep within the hidden chambers of Mount Chiliad among your ranks is a composed strategist with an uncanny talent for planning three steps ahead someone whose calm guidance political connections and flawless timing suggest she’s played this game before... and won

(WARNING: May not be fully accurate idk i tried my best with this lol)
creator: Scratch-tracker4
